title: token-top
description: Track Codex quota usage and session token statistics from the bar.

show_five_hour_bar.label: Show 5-hour limit in bar
show_five_hour_bar.description: Display the 5-hour percentage and tooltip row in the bar.

show_five_hour_panel.label: Show 5-hour limit in panel
show_five_hour_panel.description: Display the 5-hour usage card in the details panel.

color.label: Text color
color.description: Color role or hex value for the usage text in the bar.

icon_color.label: Icon color
icon_color.description: Color role or hex value for the OpenAI icon in the bar. Falls back to the text color.

errors.auth_missing: Codex auth.json was not found. Run codex login first.
errors.auth_invalid: Codex auth.json is not valid JSON.
errors.oauth_required: Codex OAuth credentials are missing. Run codex login first.
errors.unauthorized: Codex credentials were rejected. Run codex login again.
errors.network: Could not reach the Codex usage service.
errors.request_not_started: Noctalia could not start the usage request.
errors.http_status: Codex usage request failed with HTTP {status}.
errors.response_invalid: Codex returned an invalid usage response.
errors.no_windows: Codex returned no usable quota windows.
